title: polypodium virginianum
intro: Polypodium virginianum, also known as American polypody or rock cap fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Polypodium virginianum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
